title: Dynamic Light Scattering measurements
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3d2bk","text":"Brief instrument guide for Dynamic Light Scattering Wyatt DynaPro followed by specific instructions to measure the size of sonicated amyloid fibrils","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 4 µL of diluted sample (ranges 0.1-0.5 mg/mL ) onto NanoStar Disposable MicroCuvette Kit Wyatt Catalog #WNDMC
Overview of DLS instrument (turn on DLS 30m prior the measurement)
Load the cuvette into the DLS machine
Connect the device and the detector software Press 'connect instrument' button (when plugged - connected)

Record the 10 acquisitions for each measurement; 3 measurements for each sample QC of the sample includes recording polydispersity index (single size population); smooth autocorrelation function curve; correct mean size distribution
creator: andrew.west west
